---
title : "Is Democracy Overrated? {{Latin American}} Students' Support for Dictatorships"
date : "2019-01-01"
author : "Sandoval-Hernandez, Andres; Miranda, Daniel; Trevino, Ernesto & Schmelkes, S."
categories : ["Report"]
publication : " "
publication_short : " "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Sandoval-Hernandez, Andres; Miranda, Daniel; Trevino, Ernesto & Schmelkes, S. (2019). *Is Democracy Overrated? {{Latin American}} Students' Support for Dictatorships*.  

:::
